questions.question:
A Deployment named `health-api` in namespace `probe-lab` is failing because its HTTP probe wiring is wrong.

Fix the workload so that:
- the container keeps port `8080`
- `startupProbe`, `livenessProbe`, and `readinessProbe` all check path `/healthz`
- each HTTP probe targets port `8080`
- the Deployment becomes Available
- the running container serves `ok` at `http://127.0.0.1:8080/healthz`

Do not replace the container image. Fix the Deployment probe configuration in place.

verification.description: Deployment health-api uses the intended container port and HTTP probe paths
Deployment health-api becomes Available after the probe wiring is repaired
The running container serves ok at the repaired /healthz endpoint
